unique_vulnerabilities.name: Unchecked low-level call in callnotchecked()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Findings 0, 1, and 5 all reference the low-level call callee.call() in callnotchecked() on line 17, with related issues such as ignoring the return value and missing a zero-check.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Findings 2 and 3 both highlight the use of an outdated Solidity version (0.4.25) with known issues.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Low-level call in callchecked()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Finding 4 describes a low-level call in callchecked() on line 12, which is distinct from the issues in callnotchecked().
